description_long: This sculpture depicts a partially clothed male figure with a classical, athletic build, standing upright with one arm raised high and holding a curved object, possibly a sickle or a similar tool. The figure's hair is styled in defined waves, and he wears a short garment tied at the waist, leaving the torso and one leg exposed. The surface of the sculpture appears aged, with a patina that suggests it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The details in the musculature, facial features, and drapery are finely rendered, indicating skilled craftsmanship. The back view reveals a tied garment and a detailed hairstyle, while the raised arm and object are prominent from all angles. The overall form is slender and elongated, with a sense of dynamic movement captured in the pose.
description: A finely detailed bronze-like sculpture of a partially clothed male figure with one arm raised, holding a curved object, and classical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and raised arm holding a curved object, with clear details of the garment and musculature.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended arm, and the curvature of the object held aloft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, tied garment, and the back of the head with detailed hair, as well as the full extension of the raised arm.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the side profile, the length of the raised arm, and the figure's posture.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure holding a curved object
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum für Kunst und Gewerbe Hamburg
